description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the chef/chefdk Docker image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_HOST and KITCHEN_LOCAL_YAML variables. Define stages build, lint, test, functional, and deploy. Add a lint stage job named cookstyle that runs chef exec cookstyle . and another lint stage job named foodcritic that runs chef exec foodcritic . . Add a test stage job named chefspec that runs chef exec rspec spec. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
